violations.text: An employee was observed touching ready to eat food (blanched greens used as garnish) with bare hands. Food employees must not touch exposed, ready-to-eat food with their bare hands and shall use suitable utensils such as deli tissue, spatulas, single use gloves, or dispensing equipment. PIC discarded. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2025
Dishes were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC removed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed outside of back kitchen door. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector provided RIDOH guidance. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets on 2-door low boy were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2025
